creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sun Sep 29 07:25:16 UTC 2019
New revision: 513196
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/513196

Log:
  graphics/poppler: update to 0.81.0

  Release 0.81.0:
          core:
           * Splash: Always enable support for CMYK rasterization
           * CairoOutputDev: Check scaled dimensions for 0. Issue #737
           * BaseCryptStream: Fix potential uninitialized memory read
           * SplashBitmap: Fix wrong width condition for splashModeDeviceN8
           * Fix crashes in malformed files

  PR:		240781
  Exp-run by:	antoine
  Approved by:	gnome (kwm, implicit)
